task_completion.description: Agent opened the arcticlink_orbit_spec.txt document to read the orbit requirements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displaying the contents of ~/Desktop/arcticlink_orbit_spec.txt.

task_completion.description: Agent configured the GMAT force model with Earth gravity harmonics of at least 4x4, atmospheric drag, and SRP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GMAT GUI Force Model window OR GMAT script text showing Earth gravity Degree and Order >= 4, Drag enabled (e.g., Drag.AtmosphereModel), and SRP enabled.

task_completion.description: Agent configured the GMAT propagator to run for 30 days.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GMAT GUI Propagate command window OR GMAT script text showing a stopping condition of 30 days (e.g., ElapsedDays = 30.0).

task_completion.description: Agent saved the GMAT script to ~/GMAT_output/molniya_mission.script.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal, or GMAT save dialog showing the file molniya_mission.script in the ~/GMAT_output/ directory.

task_completion.description: Agent generated the analysis report at ~/GMAT_output/molniya_analysis.txt with the exactly labeled fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the contents of molniya_analysis.txt containing the exact labels: SMA_km, ECC, INC_deg, AOP_initial_deg, AOP_final_deg, AOP_drift_deg, apogee_alt_km, perigee_alt_km, and period_hours, along with their calculated values.

integrity.description: Agent actually ran the GMAT simulation to obtain the values.
integrity.visual_evidence: GMAT GUI showing the mission run, a plot/3D view of the orbit, or terminal output indicating GMAT execution.

integrity.description: The analysis report contains realistic values derived from simulation, not placeholder text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values in molniya_analysis.txt are actual numbers (e.g., SMA around 26600, ECC around 0.74) and not just '<value>'.

integrity.description: Agent did not just copy-paste the prompt requirements into the report without running the simulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report contains calculated values for AOP_drift_deg, apogee_alt_km, etc., which are not explicitly provided in the prompt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Molniya orbit should have approximately: SMA between 26400.0 and 26800.0 km, ECC between 0.70 and 0.78, INC between 62.9 and 63.9 degrees, AOP between 265.0 and 275.0 degrees, AOP drift max 5.0 degrees, Apogee altitude >= 35000.0 km, and Period between 11.9 and 12.1 hours. The script must be at /home/ga/GMAT_output/molniya_mission.script and the report at /home/ga/GMAT_output/molniya_analysis.txt.
